questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' с Present Simple?

choices.text: We will stay home unless it will snow.
We will stay home unless it snows.
We will stay home unless it snowed.
We will stay home unless it snow.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple для будущих условий, а не Future Simple или прошедшего времени.

choices.text: She will not come unless she is not invited.
She will not come unless she is invited.
She will not come unless she will be invited.
She will not come unless she invites.

questions.explanation: 'Unless' означает 'if not', поэтому после него используется утвердительная форма глагола (не 'is not invited').

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' в условном предложении?

choices.text: They will cancel the event unless the weather will improve.
They will cancel the event unless the weather improves.
They will cancel the event unless the weather improved.
They will cancel the event unless the weather improve.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' требуется Present Simple, а не Future Simple или прошедшего времени.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' с глаголом в Present Simple?

choices.text: I won't go to the party unless you come.
I won't go to the party unless you will come.
I won't go to the party unless you came.
I won't go to the party unless you are coming.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple, а не Future Simple или Continuous.

choices.text: We will not leave unless the sun rises.
We will not leave unless the sun will rise.
We will not leave unless the sun rose.
We will not leave unless the sun rising.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple, а не Future Simple или неправильная форма глагола.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' в пассивном залоге?

choices.text: She will not attend the conference unless she is informed.
She will not attend the conference unless she will be informed.
She will not attend the conference unless she was informed.
She will not attend the conference unless she informs.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple пассивного залога, а не Future Simple или прошедшего времени.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' с Present Simple?

choices.text: The flight will be delayed unless the weather clears.
The flight will be delayed unless the weather will clear.
The flight will be delayed unless the weather cleared.
The flight will be delayed unless the weather clear.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' требуется Present Simple, а не Future Simple или неправильная форма глагола.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' в условном предложении?

choices.text: They will not play soccer unless it stops raining.
They will not play soccer unless it will stop raining.
They will not play soccer unless it stopped raining.
They will not play soccer unless it stop raining.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple, а не Future Simple или прошедшего времени.

choices.text: We will not go to the beach unless the rain stops.
We will not go to the beach unless the rain will stop.
We will not go to the beach unless the rain stopped.
We will not go to the beach unless the rain stop.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple, а не Future Simple или неправильная форма глагола.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'unless' в пассивном залоге?

choices.text: He will not join the team unless he is selected.
He will not join the team unless he will be selected.
He will not join the team unless he was selected.
He will not join the team unless he selects.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple пассивного залога, а не Future Simple или прошедшего времени.
